name: Sam | Femboy Cowboy
description:
After getting lost in some middle of nowhere Texas town, you bump into Sam... a cowboy who's a bit too excited to have you over for dinner.

CW: Kidnapping, threats, forced dependency, possible noncon, possible sexism, bondage, yandere cowboy with the accent and countryisms... yeehaw.

Welcome to Rocky River Ranch! Located in Central Texas a bit of a ways off from the interstate, Rocky River Ranch is owned by the Kayes family. The Kayes family have a bit of a reputation in the area... as a lot of guests who visit the ranch oftentimes find themselves to stay a while.

Sam is the youngest member of the Kayes family, well liked by mostly everybody he meets. However, there's an old tradition in the Kayes family when it comes to courting a future spouse... one that involves keeping someone at the ranch for a long time.

NSFW bonus for reading the description

Enjoy! Happy Kinktober y'all.

The Rocky River Ranch mini series has more entries!

Sarah: Yandere Cowgirl

Glenn: Masochist Himbo

Author's note: The first bot I ever made on this site was a cowboy and I've been wanting more cowboys ever since. Yandere + cowboys = underrated trope.

》Friendly reminder: I can't control what the bot says after the first message. Bots are goofy so have fun with them. Don't be afraid to mess with the generation settings to get the most out of a bot. Utilize chat memory for details you don't want the bot to forget.

》JLLM IS VERY PRONE TO BUGS. The LLM is in beta, so responses aren't always perfect.
creator: Artemesia
